subject: fix(audit): crash bugs, security, performance, and code quality fixes
body:
Fix critical issues found during comprehensive codebase audit:

Crash fixes:
- Add runOnJS() to native gesture handlers in MessageBubble
- Add platform guard for document API in ChatPanel visibility handler
- Replace window.confirm() with cross-platform showConfirmDialog()

Security fixes:
- Sanitize OneSignal App ID with UUID regex in +html.tsx (XSS prevention)
- Sanitize deep link code param in join/[code].tsx

Rules of Hooks:
- Move early return after hooks in PWADebugBanner

Performance:
- Memoize message IDs for useReactions (prevents re-subscription churn)
- Lazy-initialize Animated.Value in InAppNotification and Toast
- Extract getAvatarEmoji outside ChatListItem component

Data/UX:
- Fix ComposeBar maxLength from 500 to 10000 (matches DB constraint)
- Remove dead showTones variable from MessageBubble
- Fix empty fragment returns to null in action sheets/modals
- Conditionally render empty Tones section in MessageInfoModal
- Fix theme class names (text-accent -> text-primary)
- Remove unused cardActive style, clean up logger calls

Tags: bugfix, security, performance, code-quality, crash-fix, audit
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-audit
Semver: patch
